summary: EV/net PP&E is an increasingly important valuation metric; installed physical assets on Earth will appreciate in value

tickers_audited.reasoning: Baker specifically named META as one of the hyperscalers with large physical asset bases when discussing the EV/net PP&E valuation framework and the 'halo trade' concept in this interview.

EQIX was not specifically named by Baker in connection with this thesis. It was added by inference as a 'canonical example' — exactly the kind of analyst extrapolation the audit rules prohibit. Baker did not specifically connect Equinix to the EV/net PP&E thesis.
DLR was not specifically named by Baker in connection with this thesis. It was added by inference as a data center REIT that fits the thesis — not because Baker explicitly cited it.
